project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Thread Network Credentials (Active Operational Dataset - network keys, PAN ID, network name)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: The app reads the device's Thread network credentials (active operational dataset) via Google Play Services ThreadNetworkClient and exports them to the Home Assistant server for Thread network management.

flow_steps.details: User triggers Thread credential export from the WebView frontend. The app reads the Thread network dataset from the device.
Reads the active Thread operational dataset from the device via Google Play Services ThreadNetworkClient. Contains network keys (TLV bytes), PAN ID, Extended PAN ID, and network name.
The Thread network credential TLV bytes are sent to the Home Assistant server via REST API for network management and sharing.
